'''Stronghold''' was a cold, stormy, remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]]. Little life survived on the surface. The Alliance created a series of caves and tunnels, where rebel soldiers could hide their families. Approximately 250 non-fighting people could be held in the underground Rebel base.<ref name="OS" />

Stronghold was sometimes used as a prison world for Imperial officers. The [[Celestial (starship)|''Celestial'']] was headed towards Stronghold with a cargo of prisoners when it was lost in [[otherspace]].<ref name="OS" />

The [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] [[Battle of Stronghold|invaded]] the planet from otherspace. They were defeated by the Rebels, and the Charon flagship ''[[Desolate]]'' was destroyed.<ref name="OS" /> One of the few survivors of the Charon attack was [[Tole Warren]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
